_comment: Upper bound for routing-context metrics emitted by
scripts/measure_routing_tokens.py. CI fails when a measurement
exceeds a ceiling. Raise a ceiling only with an explicit review comment
in the PR — the honest cost of routing grows PR by PR.
Established after Stage 2-4: see after_stage4.json for the green line.
Each ceiling carries ~10% headroom above the after-Stage-4 measurement.
